items.name: Awesome Audio Plugins Dev

items.name: Awesome Audio Lists
items.description: Parent hub for audio directories, plugin submission targets, sample-pack directories, music-platform lists, and public discovery surfaces.

items.name: Awesome Music Platforms
items.description: SEO-maximized list of music platforms for streaming, distribution, beat selling, sample packs, sync licensing, promotion, storefronts, analytics, and independent artist tools.

items.name: Awesome Python Audio Science
items.description: Python scientific audio, DSP, MIR, machine-learning audio, datasets, notebooks, plugin testing, and creator-audio research tooling; linked to the TizWildin HUB and deconstructed-loop/router ecosystem.

items.name: FreeEQ8
items.description: Flagship free/open audio plugin anchor for GitHub SEO, producer trust, plugin-discovery traffic, and the larger TizWildin audio ecosystem.

items.name: FreeVox8
items.description: Canonical spectral vocoder and ghost-resynthesis continuation anchor for future HUB routing, plugin list visibility, and public audio-tech credibility.

items.name: TizWildin Release Vault
items.description: Release proof and catalog routing surface for distributed tracks, monetized releases, and official TizWildin music catalog status.

items.description: Public GitHub Pages router for plugins, lists, packs, deconstructed loops, visualizers, release proof, and TizWildin ecosystem navigation.

items.name: Deconstructed Loops / Packs Router
items.description: Public route for TizWildin deconstructed loops, stems, free sample packs, producer assets, and future pack-store/Release Vault handoff.

items.name: ARC-Neuron-LLMBuilder
items.description: Local-first cognition-core builder for ARC: dataset preparation, model-building experiments, GGUF-oriented local AI workflows, receipts, and reproducible AI growth pipelines.

items.name: ARC-Core
items.description: Signal-intelligence event spine and local-first AI governance console for deterministic routing, authority gates, receipts, calibration, incident tracking, and replayable evidence.

items.name: arc-lucifer-cleanroom-runtime
items.description: Local-first cleanroom AI runtime route for offline model execution, token streaming, deterministic event capture, and reproducible inference behavior.

items.name: arc-language-module
items.description: Language and cognition foundation route for linguistic structure, transliteration, lineage, phonology, and language-learning data.

items.name: Arc-RAR
items.description: CLI-first archive manager with native-app control plane, autowrap intent validation, receipts, restore paths, and reproducible project archive handling.

items.name: OmniBinary Runtime
items.description: Native-first binary intake and execution-fabric scaffold for file inspection, host profiling, lane selection, receipts, audits, and runtime-readiness reporting.

items.name: Therum
items.description: Bootleg Serum — free wavetable synthesizer with visual waveform editing and modulation.

items.name: XyloCore
items.description: Playable xylophone / tuned-percussion instrument with velocity-mapped samples and keyboard control.

items.name: AETHER
items.description: Choir & atmosphere designer for cinematic sound design — procedural choirs, pads, and evolving textures.

items.name: BassMaid
items.description: Bass enhancement and low-end processing toolkit.

items.name: ChainMaid
items.description: Sidechain plugin — clean sidechain ducking and pumping effects for EDM, trap, and mix engineering.

items.name: FreeSampler
items.description: Lightweight high-performance audio sampler plugin.

items.name: GlueMaid
items.description: Mix bus glue and cohesion tool — compression and tonal shaping.

items.name: Instrudio
items.description: 10 fully playable instruments — cross-platform instrument ecosystem with hybrid HTML/plugin architecture.

items.name: MeterMaid
items.description: Single-plugin mastering + metering suite: BS.1770-4 K-weighted loudness, EBU R128 gated integration, 4× oversampled true peak, spectrogram, chromagram, goniometer, and an octagonal target radar.

items.name: MixMaid
items.description: Real-time spectral balance and mix correction — gently guides mixes toward balanced tonal distribution, proper headroom, and controlled dynamics.

items.name: MultiMaid
items.description: Focused multiband dynamics plugin for the Maid suite — deliberately non-overlapping with FreeEQ8, GlueMaid, MixMaid, BassMaid, SpaceMaid, ChainMaid, and MeterMaid.

items.name: PaintMask
items.description: Visual paint-based audio processing — shape sound with brush strokes, splashes, and geometry that become MIDI patterns.

items.name: PAP-Forge-Audio
items.description: Procedural Autonomous Plugins runtime for generating, branching, mutating, validating, and restoring plugin projects from natural-language sound intent.

items.name: RiftWave Suite
items.description: Modular synth engine + waveform synthesis — RiftSynth + WaveForm in Lite and Pro editions.

items.name: SpaceMaid
items.description: Spatial audio processing — depth, width, and reverb tools.

items.name: VF-PlexLab
items.description: VocalForge PersonaPlex Lab — JUCE plugin + local backend + HTML tester around NVIDIA PersonaPlex for voice-conditioned vocal asset generation, spoken hooks, whispers, chants, and sample-pack export.

items.name: WhisperGate
items.description: Procedural whispers, ghost choirs, and ritual atmospheres through an interactive geometry interface.

items.name: WURP
items.description: Toxic Motion Engine — mutates audio with formant motion, corrosive saturation, elastic pitch, and reactive animated UI.

items.name: Free 808 Producer Kit
items.description: 94 hand-crafted 808 bass samples tuned to every chromatic key.

items.name: Free Dark Piano Sound Kit
items.description: 88 piano notes plus dark and cinematic loops and MIDI.

items.name: Free Future Bass Producer Kit
items.description: Loops, fills, drums, bass, synths, pads, and FX.

items.name: Free Riser Producer Kit
items.description: 115+ risers and 63 downlifters - noise, synth, drum, FX, cinematic.

items.name: Free Violin Synth Sample Kit
items.description: Physical-model violin sample kit rendered from the Instrudio violin instrument.

items.name: Phonk Producer Toolkit
items.description: Drift phonk starter kit - 808s, cowbells, drums, MIDI, templates.

items.name: TizWildin-Aurora
items.description: 3-segment original synth melody pack with loops, stems, demo renders, and neon/cinematic phrasing.

items.name: TizWildin-Chime
items.description: Multi-part 88 BPM chime collection spanning glass, void, halo, reed, and neon synthwave lanes.

items.name: TizWildin-Chroma
items.description: Multi-segment game synthwave loop sample pack from TizWildin Entertainment.

items.name: TizWildin-Obsidian
items.description: Dark cinematic sample pack with choir textures, menu loops, transitions, bass, atmosphere, drums, and electric-banjo extensions.

items.name: TizWildin-Skyline
items.description: 30 BPM-tagged synthwave and darkwave loops with generator snapshot and dark neon additions.
